positive: A minimalist, elegant illustration of a whimsical constellation map. The main subject is a grouping of stylized celestial bodies (stars, crescent moons, nebulae) arranged in a harmonious, symmetrical pattern. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue palette contrasted with brilliant gold and opal accents. The composition should feature clean, thick linework and smooth gradients, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Focus on negative space and clean silhouettes. The style should be modern cosmic folklore, combining Art Nouveau organic fluidity with crisp vector graphics. Perfect for central placement on apparel. High contrast, volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed, 4K, printed artwork.
